input.scenario: A customer disputes a duplicate charge.
input.transcript:
SETUP: duplicate $40 charge.
A: I'll check if one is a pending auth.

expected.transcript:
SETUP: duplicate $40 charge.
A: I'll check if one is a pending auth.
B: Confirmed — one is a pending auth that will drop off in 3-5 days; no real double charge.

input.scenario: Two engineers negotiate a hotfix scope.
input.transcript:
SETUP: production bug.
A: Ship the smallest revert.

expected.transcript:
SETUP: production bug.
A: Ship the smallest revert.
B: Agreed — revert now, full fix in tomorrow's release.
